title: Marina Ka Machhuara
subtitle: Samundar ki lehron mein chupa saazish...
mystery: Marina beach par mashoor machhuara Velu ki naav jali hui mili. Velu gayab hai. Police ko lagta hai accident hai, par naav ke paas aag lagane ka saaman mila.

clues.name: Kerosene Ka Dibba
clues.description: Naav ke paas ek khali kerosene ka dibba.

clues.name: Tooti Ghadi
clues.description: Ek mehengi ghadi, time 11:30 par ruka hai.

clues.name: Bikhre Note
clues.description: Kuch 500 ke note ret mein dabe the.

characters.name: Karthik Seth
characters.description: Ameer businessman, Velu se naav kharidna chahta tha.

dialogues.response: Hotel mein tha. Velu ki naav se mujhe kya?
Ye meri ghadi wahan kaise? Main bas baat karne gaya tha!

characters.name: Muthu
characters.description: Velu ka bachpan ka dost. Kaafi dariya dil hai.

dialogues.response: Pata nahi saheb. Karthik babu raat ko dhamki de rahe the.

spots.name: Jali Naav ⛵
spots.description: Naav ka adha hissa jala hua hai.

spots.name: Jhaadiyan 🌿
spots.description: Jhaadiyon ke peeche kuch chupa hai.

title: Mylapore Ki Murti
subtitle: Mandir se chori hui sadiyon purani dharohar...
mystery: Mylapore ke kapaleeshwarar mandir se ek choti sone ki murti gayab ho gayi. Pujari ko behosh paya gaya. CCTV wires kaate gaye the.

clues.name: Kaate Hue Wire
clues.description: Plier se CCTV ki taar kaati gayi.

clues.name: Chloroform Rumaal
clues.description: Pujari ke paas ek rumaal mila jisme dawai ki mehek hai.

characters.name: Ravi Electrician
characters.description: Wiring ka kaam karta tha. Use CCTV ki location pata thi.

dialogues.trigger: Kal raat ki shift tumhari thi?
dialogues.response: Haan, par main 10 baje nikal gaya tha.

dialogues.trigger: Taar tumhari plier se kaati hai?
dialogues.response: Mera plier wahan chhut gaya tha! Maine chori nahi ki!

characters.name: Swami Ji
characters.description: Behosh the, unhe kuch theek se yaad nahi.

dialogues.response: Chehra nahi dikha, par uske kapdon se bijli ke wire ki mehek aa rahi thi.

spots.name: Garbhagriha 🛕
spots.description: Pavitra jagah, yahan se murti chori hui.

title: Charminar Ka Chhal
subtitle: Nizami shaan mein dhokhe ki mehek...
mystery: Ek mashoor ittar (perfume) bechne wale ki dukaan mein ek fake ittar bottle mili, jisne ek ameer grahak ko behosh kar diya. Asli ittar ki bottle gayab hai.

clues.name: Nakli Bottle
clues.description: Bottle ka label thoda tedha laga hai.

clues.name: Courier Receipt
clues.description: Ek receipt mili jisme 'Mumbai' bheja gaya package likha hai.

characters.name: Farhan
characters.description: Ittar ka expert, par paise ki sakht zaroorat thi.

dialogues.response: Mujhe kya pata, shayad safai mein gum ho gayi!
Aapko kaise pata? Woh toh... bas ek sample tha!

characters.name: Nawab Sahab
characters.description: Behosh hue the. Abhi gusse mein hain.

dialogues.response: Sunghne ke baad chakkar aaye. Farhan ne hi mujhe test karwaya tha.

spots.name: Main Counter 🪞
spots.description: Kanch ka counter, yahan saare ittar rakhe hain.

title: Banjara Hills Ki Raat
subtitle: Bade gharon ke andhere raaz...
mystery: Ek high-profile party ke dauran ghar ke maalik ka laptop gayab ho gaya jisme top-secret business deal thi. Party mein sirf VIPs the.

clues.name: Lipstick Wala Glass
clues.description: Laptop table ke paas ek wine glass jispar laal lipstick hai.

clues.name: Gira Hua USB
clues.description: Zameen par ek chhota sa USB drive mila.

characters.name: Neha Reddy
characters.description: Party mein bin bulaye mehmaan. Hamesha business secrets churati hai.

dialogues.trigger: Aap study room mein kya kar rahi thi?
dialogues.response: Main sirf washroom dhoondh rahi thi.
Fine! Maine USB lagaya tha par laptop nahi churaya!

characters.name: Mr. Sharma
characters.description: Bahut pareshan hain. Deal cancel ho sakti hai.

dialogues.response: Study table par. Wahan aakhri baar Neha ko dekha tha.

title: Taj Ka Saaya
subtitle: Mohabbat ki nishani aur ek dhokha...
mystery: Taj Mahal ke paas ek purani haveli mein ek videshi tourist ka mehenga camera chori ho gaya. Haveli ka malik kehta hai usne ek bandar ko camera le jaate dekha.

clues.name: Camera Lens Cap
clues.description: Lens ka dhakkan ek chhatri ke neeche mila.

clues.name: Aadha Khaya Kela
clues.description: Bandar ko lalach dene ke liye kela rakha gaya tha.

characters.name: Munna Guide
characters.description: Tourist ko haveli laya tha. Bandaron ko control karna jaanta hai.

dialogues.response: Bandar bahut shaitaan hain sahab, le gaye honge!

dialogues.trigger: Chhat par kele kyun rakhe the?
dialogues.response: Woh toh main... bandaron ko bhagane ke liye! Maine chori nahi ki!

characters.name: John Smith
characters.description: Camera mein bahut keemti photos the.

dialogues.response: Munna went upstairs, then I heard a monkey, and my camera was gone!

spots.name: Haveli Ka Aangan 🪴
spots.description: Khula aangan, yahan bandar aate hain.
